name: inline-ai
description: AI-powered inline code completion and assistance.

commands.title: AI Auto Responder: Cancel Active Request

aiAutoResponder.openRouterApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenRouter API key used for requests. Store this in user settings.

aiAutoResponder.rolePrompt.default: You are AI which gives short answer
aiAutoResponder.rolePrompt.description: Role/system-style prompt prepended to the user @ai prompt.

aiAutoResponder.enableReasoning.description: Whether to request reasoning from compatible OpenRouter models.

aiAutoResponder.providerSort.description: OpenRouter provider sorting strategy (for example: price, throughput, latency).

aiAutoResponder.wholeFileRolePrompt.default: You are an expert coding assistant. Use the provided full file context and return the best code completion or edit response for the query.

aiAutoResponder.filesRolePrompt.default: You are a coding assistant. Use the provided retrieved file contents as context and answer precisely.
aiAutoResponder.filesRolePrompt.description: Role/system-style prompt used for @ai.files <query> .. requests that retrieve file context from the workspace.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
